providers.name: Academia

providers.name: Actual Computer

providers.name: Gopher AI
providers.notes: Provider entry for the Gopher SN42 documentation and subnet source repository. The project website and API hosts were not promoted because they did not return safe public probe responses during review.

providers.name: Gradients

providers.name: Nodexo
providers.notes: Provider entry for Nodexo Compute / SN27. Official browser-facing website, docs, and console surfaces are tracked, but simple Node/HEAD probes currently receive connection resets and are not treated as healthy monitored endpoints.

providers.name: Nodies
providers.notes: Public RPC provider referenced by public endpoint directories. Exact endpoint entries require active verification before promotion.

providers.name: Numinous
providers.notes: The public API exposes a machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 schema and a safe read-only health endpoint.
providers.public_notes: Provider profile for Numinous / SN6. Public surfaces include the Numinous website, source repository, Swagger UI, OpenAPI schema, and read-only health/API data surfaces.

providers.name: One Covenant
providers.notes: Provider entry for the Covenant/TPLR subnet family. SN3, SN39, and SN81 are tracked as reviewed identity-drift cases because current native chain names are generic or deprecated while public sources identify the projects as Templar, Basilica, and Grail.

providers.name: oneoneone

providers.name: OnFinality

providers.notes: Provider entry for ORO SN15 website, documentation, and source repository.

providers.notes: Provider entry for Plaτform SN100. Public surfaces include the Platform website, docs, and source repository; common API/OpenAPI probe paths currently return 404 and are not promoted.

providers.name: Ridges
